game: Super Smash Bros. Brawl - The Subspace Emissary

v0.1.0.description:
first release of the SSE APWorld! features stage randomization.

note that as a first, incredibly rough release, the logic is very linear and getting BKd is very possible

Info: https://github.com/kenniky/ArchipelagoSSE/blob/main/worlds/ssbb_sse/docs/en_SubspaceEmissary.md
Setup: https://github.com/kenniky/ArchipelagoSSE/blob/main/worlds/ssbb_sse/docs/en_SubspaceEmissary_Setup.md
FAQ: https://github.com/kenniky/ArchipelagoSSE/blob/main/worlds/ssbb_sse/docs/faq.md
v0.1.0.title: Subspace Emissary APWorld 0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
Changelog
- added orange cubes as a check
- added stickers as filler items
- fixed the double authentication bug

next on roadmap:
- room checks
- great maze trophy items (to unlock Tabuu fight)

Info: https://github.com/kenniky/ArchipelagoSSE/blob/main/worlds/ssbb_sse/docs/en_SubspaceEmissary.md
Setup: https://github.com/kenniky/ArchipelagoSSE/blob/main/worlds/ssbb_sse/docs/en_SubspaceEmissary_Setup.md
FAQ: https://github.com/kenniky/ArchipelagoSSE/blob/main/worlds/ssbb_sse/docs/faq.md
v0.1.1.title: Subspace Emissary APWorld 0.1.1

v0.1.2.description:
Bugfixes

- The Ruins now works properly, letting you play as Lucas and Pokemon Trainer and successfully exiting on completion

QoL

- Disabled "character joined your team" notifications
- updated setup guide

This version is backwards compatible with v0.1.1
v0.1.2.title: Subspace Emissary APWorld 0.1.2
